Bulk session CSV import — column contract (see backend/src/modules/import/service.ts)

REQUIRED HEADER NAMES (all must appear on the first row; use lowercase names so row values are read correctly — mixed-case headers can pass the header check but leave row fields empty):
  client_row_id      — non-empty per row; stable id for idempotency with clientImportId
  program_id         — must belong to the authenticated tenant
  title              — non-empty
  duration_seconds   — positive integer (parseInt; see edge rows in sessions-import-full.csv)
  instructor_name    — non-empty

OPTIONAL COLUMNS (omit entire column if unused):
  tags               — split on | or , ; trim each token; empty cell => no tags
  position           — non-negative integer; omit or leave empty => append after max position

PROGRAM ID IN FIXTURES: CSVs use program id cmp3viht60006ycdv8rmlfhnq wherever a tenant-owned program is required (swap for a program id from your DB if yours differs). sessions-import-full.csv ends with a fake program id row for “program not found”.

FIXTURE FILES (3):

  sessions-import-full.csv
    Single file covering: happy-path rows; tags (pipe/comma, trim, unicode tags); explicit positions including 0; unicode / punctuation / emoji in titles and instructors; duration edge cases (leading zeros, spaces, decimals, partial parse, scientific notation); duplicate client_row_id in one upload (second row idempotent); two rows same explicit position 5 (second fails unique); per-row validation failures (blank ids, bad program, empty fields, zero/invalid duration, bad position, whitespace-only instructor); program not found.

  sessions-import-shuffled-headers.csv
    Only the five required columns, different column order — same contract as full.csv, one valid data row.

  sessions-import-header-only.csv
    Header row only — API should return 400 “CSV has no data rows”.

CROSS-TENANT / NOT FOUND: Use a random program id from another tenant or a fake id like clxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx — expect “program not found for this tenant”.

IDEMPOTENCY (API-level): Re-post the same CSV with the same clientImportId; existing client_row_id rows return ok + idempotent true without duplicating sessions.
